calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Dec-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Tetzlaff for Ann Holland.

Ms. Tetzlaff stated that she has heard nothing. The Court granted the petition to establish fact of death (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Dec-31-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Tetzlaff for Ann Holland (Petitioner).

Ms. Tetzlaff stated that the Galster Estate is pending in this Court, that it was her error in not noticing the Parties (Galster and Sawada), that she can not get a response from the Decedent's Sister and that she received a letter in August from the Sister stating that she would provide a family death registry but that nothing was sent. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death was continued to December 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice to Hiromi Sawada and the issue of Arthur Galster, and a declaration under penalty of perjury from the Sister stating that she was present/there at time of death.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)
